title: Construction, Invariants, Dataclasses, and Slots · Traceback Repair Bay
summary: Build trustworthy catalog, member, and loan objects from validated external records. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in validated library entity types and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish object allocation in __new__ from initialization in __init__ and override either only for justified behavior.
Establish complete valid object invariants during construction or reject invalid input with meaningful errors.
Implement classmethod alternate constructors that normalize external representations through one invariant path.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-oop cumulative stakeholder program."""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

# Add one tested, typed, inspectable program increment per activity.

steps.title: Order the regression proof
steps.instruction: Order the Oop Value Objects evidence cycle before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Oop Value Objects assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Design immutable value objects with coherent equality, hashing, normalization, and validation semantics. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: python construction invariants. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Oop Value Objects, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a complete first version of validated library entity types while every earlier competency remains active.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Any object with an equals method is automatically safe as a dictionary key. This fails the Oop Value Objects contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: Descriptor Guide (Python 3.14.6) — Controls descriptor precedence, properties, functions, methods, and managed attribute implementation.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Design immutable value objects with coherent equality, hashing, normalization, and validation semantics.
